launches.name: VideoOS by Jupitrr AI
launches.tagline: Your all-in-one video workflow
launches.description: VideoOS is the all-in-one video marketing platform for businesses. Find trending topics in your niche, write scripts with AI, record with our Auto Jump Cut teleprompter, auto-edit with subtitles and B-roll, and publish directly to your socials. One app instead of five. Go from idea to posted video faster.

launches.name: Mintlify Editor
launches.tagline: AI-native collaborative editor
launches.description: The Mintlify editor is WYSIWYG, live-collaborative, git synced, and AI-native — so every teammate can contribute, from engineers pushing from the CLI to marketers editing in the browser to agents updating docs automatically.

launches.name: Wonder
launches.tagline: The AI design agent that works on your canvas
launches.description: Wonder puts an AI design agent directly on the canvas. Generate UI, graphics, and pitch decks, then select any element to refine in real time. Connect MCP to coding agents like Cursor and Claude Code to ship straight from design. Now in public alpha.

launches.name: Hera Launch
launches.tagline: Create studio-quality launch videos with AI
launches.description: Product launch videos used to take weeks. Hera Launch makes them in seconds, from a single prompt. This works because Hera is opinionated. It works like a motion design studio and decides pacing, typography, motion curves, and easing for you. We built it for product teams that want to launch fast and often: 10 minutes from idea to finished video, on a monthly subscription.

launches.name: Gemini Deep Research Agent
launches.tagline: Web and MCP research agents, now in Gemini API
launches.description: Two research agents in the Gemini API: Deep Research for low-latency interactive workflows, Deep Research Max for exhaustive async synthesis. Both support MCP data sources and native chart generation. For developers and AI engineers.

launches.name: File Generation in Gemini
launches.tagline: Generate production-ready files directly in your chat
launches.description: Gemini can now generate downloadable files directly in chat, including Google Docs, Sheets, Slides, PDFs, Word, Excel, CSV, LaTeX, Markdown, TXT, and RTF. Go from prompt to ready-to-share file without copying, pasting, or reformatting.

launches.name: Mistral Medium 3.5
launches.tagline: A 128B model for coding, reasoning, and long tasks
launches.description: Mistral Medium 3.5 is a 128B dense model merging coding, reasoning, and instruction-following in one set of weights. 256k context, configurable reasoning effort. Open weights on HuggingFace for engineers and teams running self-hosted inference.

launches.name: SuperMind
launches.tagline: Business that Runs Itself
launches.description: The Mind Behind Your Operations.SuperMind deploys 13 specialist AI agents across your entire business - Sales, Finance, CTO, Customer Success, HR, Legal, and more, that execute operations end-to-end with your approval before anything important moves. Not a chatbot. An operating system. Company memory that never forgets. Parallel agents running 24/7. One tap approvals. Morning briefings while you sleep. Your business finally runs like one.

launches.name: KushoAI for Playwright
launches.tagline: Open-source Terminal UI, just record & get exhaustive tests
launches.description: Open-source TUI for Playwright testing. Record your flow in the browser, then everything happens in your terminal. No tab-switching to ChatGPT/Claude, no copy-pasting, no manual context juggling. Bring your own API key (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini). Runs entirely local. Our LLM orchestration expands one recording into comprehensive test coverage - edge cases, error handling, boundary conditions - more efficiently than calling LLMs directly. Record, generate, run: all terminal-native. MIT licensed.

launches.name: Motorola Razr Fold
launches.tagline: A foldable phone built for pen-first productivity
launches.description: Motorola Razr Fold is Motorola’s first book-style foldable, with an 8.1-inch inner display, Snapdragon 8 Gen 5, 6000mAh battery, 80W charging, a DXOMARK Gold-rated foldable camera system, and Moto Pen Ultra support for notes, annotations, and big-screen productivity.

launches.name: Tinfoil
launches.tagline: AI chat and API that keeps your conversations fully private
launches.description: Don’t want OpenAI seeing all your conversations? We don’t either. That’s why we built Tinfoil - an AI that keeps your conversations strictly between you and the AI model, everyone else is locked out. It’s like a local AI but running in the cloud, using secure hardware. Tinfoil leverages hardware security features available on NVIDIA GPUs to deliver verifiable privacy. No pinky promises required: you can check for yourself that your conversations are end-to-end private.

launches.name: Symphony
launches.tagline: An open-source spec for Codex orchestration
launches.description: What if every open issue had a Codex agent? That’s the idea behind Symphony, an open-source agent orchestrator for Codex that turns task trackers into always-on systems for agentic work, letting humans focus on review and direction.

launches.name: ElevenMusic
launches.tagline: AI-assisted music creation with built-in discovery, royalty
launches.description: ElevenMusic lets you discover independent artists, remix their tracks, create original music with AI assistance, and earn royalties when listeners engage. Available on web and iOS.

launches.name: Tabstack
launches.tagline: Extract web data and automate browsers, no scraper required.
launches.description: Tabstack is a web data and automation API that delivers reliable structured output. Pass a URL and a schema, get back JSON that matches every time. Run research in one call and get cited answers back. Automate browsers without running infrastructure. The intelligence is built into every API call. No scraper to build, maintain, or watch break when a site changes. Built at Mozilla.

launches.name: Voice Agent API
launches.tagline: One API to build production-ready voice agents
launches.description: The fastest path to a working Voice Agent, built on the most accurate Voice AI in the market. Stream audio in, get audio back. We handle the rest. ~1s latency. Best-in-class accuracy on the stuff that matters (numbers, emails, names). Tool calling that doesn't go silent. Mid-call prompt + voice + tool updates. $4.50/hr flat. No per-token. No concurrency caps. Most devs ship a working agent the same day.

launches.name: ElevenLabs Agent Templates
launches.tagline: Deploy pre-built voice and chat agents for support, sales
launches.description: Pre-built ElevenAgents for customer support, AI SDRs, and internal enablement. Point a template at your knowledge base or workflow and deploy a configured voice or chat agent without building from scratch.

launches.name: Basedash Dashboard Agent
launches.tagline: Builds entire dashboards from a single prompt
launches.description: The Dashboard Agent builds entire dashboards from a single prompt. Describe what you want to see — "Everything about new user signups" or "MRR and churn this quarter" — and the agent picks the charts, writes the SQL, and lays them out for you. You get KPIs, a hero chart, and the breakdowns that actually answer your question, all connected to live data. No SQL. No composing dashboards chart by chart. Describe a dashboard. Get a dashboard.

launches.name: Miaw AI secretary
launches.tagline: Non-invasive AI secretary to help without context switching
launches.description: simple floating chat ai miaw chat. Contribute to RiziqStankovic/miaw-ai-desktop development by creating an account on GitHub.

launches.name: doola MCP for US LLC Formation
launches.tagline: Start your business using AI in Claude and Replit
launches.description: doola is now live as an MCP integration. Start a Wyoming LLC through Claude or Replit in minutes. An AI agent collects your info, doola handles the formation. The first business formation platform built for the agentic era.

launches.name: Crin AI
launches.tagline: Learn about AI & watch text become tokens in a node graph
launches.description: Most AI courses explain concepts. CRIN shows them. Watch raw text become tokens, integers, then vectors — live, in an animated node graph. Every transformation is visible, every step has real data. Built for developers who learn by seeing. Three depth levels per concept — beginner to advanced — so you always learn at your pace. No slides. No passive video. Just AI, showing its work.

launches.name: MailToDock
launches.tagline: Turn Gmail into Google Tasks with AI-powered
launches.description: MailToDock is a Chrome extension that helps you turn emails into clear, actionable to-dos. Open an email in Gmail, click generate, and AI will suggest task candidates with titles, notes, due dates, priority, and subtasks. Review them, edit if needed, and add them directly to Google Tasks — without leaving Gmail. Built for busy founders, operators, freelancers, and anyone who lives in their inbox.

launches.name: Spec27
launches.tagline: Spec-driven testing for AI agents and AI apps
launches.description: Spec27 is a validation platform for AI agents. It helps teams move beyond manual, vibes-based testing by using machine-readable specifications to generate broader test coverage, catch regressions earlier, and validate both in-house and third-party systems without needing SDK integration or code-level access.

launches.name: Kinetik
launches.tagline: OpenClaw for creators: content, ops, growth
launches.description: The unsexy truth about being a creator: half your time isn't creating — it's guessing what works, negotiating with brands and analyzing trends. Kinetik handles everything around content and monetization, so the best part – making it – stays yours. It learns your niche, tells you what works, what to post next and how to monetize. Chat via WhatsApp – voice, photos or text – not every creator needs to be organized, unless it's Kinetik.

launches.name: Syllaby's Storyboard
launches.tagline: Plan and Visualize Your Video Scenes Before Production
launches.description: Syllaby’s new Multi‑Scene Storyboard lets you plan and visualize your entire video before rendering. Build scenes, reorder, edit prompts, set first‑to‑last frames, and choose from top AI models like Veo, Kling, and Sora. Smooth transitions and seamless stitching give you a polished, ready‑to‑share final video.

launches.name: HabiLife
launches.tagline: Building the future of Social Fitness
launches.description: Track your habits, join team challenges, climb the leaderboard, and transform your wellness journey. Free download, no ads. HabiLife is a social habit-building and wellness app designed to help people build sustainable healthy routines and stay accountable through community-driven motivation. Built for anyone looking to improve their lifestyle, whether it's losing weight, building better daily habits, or staying consistent. HabiLife solves the biggest problem in habit formation.

launches.name: Multos AI
launches.tagline: Describe it. Build it. Deploy it. One prompt
launches.description: Most AI coding tools stop at code generation. Multos builds, previews, fixes bugs, and deploys to AWS, Azure, GCP, and other major clouds from one prompt. It remembers your project across sessions and supports web, mobile, and game development. You get a live product, not a code snippet. A software engineer and DevOps engineer in one.

launches.name: AnyCompare
launches.tagline: AI agents that compare any products with clinical precision
launches.description: Stop drowning in browser tabs and biased SEO affiliate lists. AnyCompare deploys parallel AI research agents to scrape, normalize, and verify technical specs across the web in real-time. Whether you're comparing SaaS providers, automotive specs, or developer tools, get an institutional-grade, zero-hallucination data matrix in seconds. Stop searching. Start deciding.

launches.name: Sandock
launches.tagline: Persistent Docker Workspaces for Coding Agents
launches.description: Your coding agent needs a real filesystem — not a sandbox that forgets everything. Sandock gives it one: long-running Docker containers with SSD-backed persistent volumes and 100% POSIX compatibility. Run Claude Code, Codex, Anthropic Agent SDK, OpenClaw, Hermes, Pi Coding Agent, or your own agents directly — or embed them into your product. Terminal, browser, preview, git, and MCP workflows are built in, with pricing from $5/mo.

launches.name: Zyloassist
launches.tagline: Your On-demand Digital Agent
launches.description: Transform support and internal processes with an AI virtual assistant built for real-time, secure conversations. Zyloassist is an intelligent AI agent software built for modern businesses. With secure integration and conversational AI features, it acts as a virtual assistant to automate responses, manage data, and enhance customer experience directly through your website.

launches.name: Blomma
launches.tagline: Career coaching powered by AI. Accessible to all.
launches.description: Blomma is your career coach. Powered by AI, accessible to all. Think through challenges, track goals, and turn insight into action with private, practical guidance and personalized growth whenever you need it. Add context, use voice mode to talk things through, and get support for everyday questions, new roles or bigger career turning points, all in one app that's accessible and personalized. Use code EARLYHUNTER to be one of the first to access Blomma.

launches.name: Pingoru
launches.tagline: Catch vendor outages before your users complain
launches.description: Pingoru watches public status pages so you don't have to. It monitors 6,200+ cloud and SaaS providers like AWS, GCP, Azure, OpenAI, GitHub, Cloudflare, Slack, Zoom, Datadog, Shopify, Vercel, Supabase, HubSpot, Twilio, and thousands more. It pings you the moment any of them reports an incident. Scope alerts to the components you actually use, so you only hear about EC2 us-east-1, not every other AWS service outage.

launches.name: Soniar
launches.tagline: The 202KB AI Dream Interpreter running on the Edge
launches.description: Soniar is an ultra-fast AI dream interpreter built for speed. While others use heavy frameworks, we run 100% on Cloudflare Workers (Edge) and Supabase. Key features: • Nano-sized: Entire app is only 202KB. • Instant: Global response speed under 500ms. • Battle-tested: +1,000 requests processed with 0% error. No bloat, no trackers. Just pure AI insights delivered instantly. Use code SONIAR99OFF for 99% off!

launches.name: CodeRouter
launches.tagline: Cut your AI coding bill 70% with automatic task routing
launches.description: Claude Code and Cursor route everything through Opus ($75/M tokens) — even file reads and commit messages. CodeRouter adds phase-aware task routing: it detects what you're doing and picks the optimal model. Planning gets Opus. Implementation gets Sonnet/DeepSeek. Tests get Flash. Real result: $212/mo to $63/mo. One URL change, same workflow. Works with Cursor, Claude Code, Aider, Copilot, Windsurf. 1M free tokens on signup.

launches.name: MSX
launches.tagline: Spotify for Apps - Fixing how AI apps get users & make money
launches.description: MSX is an app store, billing & distribution layer for agent-run apps: agent publish apps autonomously, users access them with one login and subscription, and creators get paid by usage. Users pay $29.99/month for unlimited access—no logins or per-app billing. Apps open instantly via chat. Agents publish apps through a msx.json manifest and a scoped MSX_TOKEN, via CLI, REST, MCP. MSX handles auth, metering, and payouts. Revenue is shared based on real usage. Think Spotify for AI apps.

launches.name: AI App Cost Savings Video Series
launches.tagline: Practical patterns for reducing LLM costs in production apps
launches.description: Watch a practical developer-focused video series on reducing LLM costs in production AI apps without making products slower or weaker. The first batch covers six cost leaks: wrong model choice, duplicate calls, oversized context, broken prompt caching, unnecessary reasoning, and real-time calls that could be batched. Treat AI cost control as engineering, not a billing surprise.

launches.name: Help Content from Code
launches.tagline: Turn any codebase into help articles your AI agent can use
launches.description: A Claude Code skill that reads your codebase and writes a complete help center — no templates, no manual work. It analyzes routes, components, config schemas, and error messages to build a content plan, then writes professional articles optimized for AI agent retrieval. Every claim traces back to actual source code. Articles are structured so tools like Intercom’s Fin, Zendesk AI, or any RAG system can retrieve and use them accurately. Plain markdown output — import anywhere, no vendor lock-in.

launches.name: Zenmove
launches.tagline: Find trusted movers and get instant moving cost estimates
launches.description: Zenmove helps you plan your move with confidence. Estimate costs, itemize your inventory, and compare quotes from trusted movers—all in one place.

launches.name: Atmita
launches.tagline: Agents for the rest of us
launches.description: Atmita is a cloud-native AI OS where agents own automations end-to-end. They run on schedules, events, or AI-decided heartbeats, act across 1,000+ apps through APIs and managed OAuth integrations, and only ask for approval when it matters.

launches.name: GetThePrice
launches.tagline: Approval-safe Shopify pricing from competitor signals.
launches.description: GetThePrice helps Shopify sellers protect margin and move faster by turning competitor signals into approval-safe pricing actions. Map competitor URLs to your SKUs, review pricing suggestions with floor/ceiling guardrails, and only publish changes after you or your team approves—built for control, not black-box automation.

launches.name: PromptJolt
launches.tagline: One-click prompt enhancer for ChatGPT, Claude & Gemini
launches.description: PromptJolt is a one-click AI prompt enhancer that works natively inside ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini. Type your idea the way you'd say it out loud, hit Enhance, and PromptJolt rewrites it into a clear, structured prompt — so you finally get the answer you wanted on the first try. Free, supports 50+ languages, no prompt engineering needed.

launches.name: DevLens
launches.tagline: The Autonomous Intelligence Layer for Pull Requests
launches.description: DevLens is the autonomous intelligence layer for pull requests. Connect GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket — and 6 AI agents review every PR in parallel: security scanning, test generation, dependency audits, blast radius analysis, IaC review, and secret detection. You get a risk score, merge recommendation, and one-click fixes — all posted as inline comments in under 60 seconds. No YAML, no config, no manual triage. Just connect your repo and open a PR. Free tier included.

launches.name: Quarkdown
launches.tagline: Markdown wit LaTeX in a modern typesetting system
launches.description: Quarkdown is a modern, fast, Markdown-based typesetting system to create papers, presentations, knowledge bases and websites. Write in the markup language you're already familiar with for a flat learning curve, but juice it up with powerful extensions for full control over your documents, and live preview to enter flow state faster. Quarkdown runs on VS Code or your terminal.

launches.name: Rova AI
launches.tagline: Autonomous, goal-driven testing for web & mobile apps
launches.description: Rova AI explores your web and mobile apps, validates real user workflows, adapts to UI changes, and generates clear reports, without writing test scripts. Simply tag ROVA on your issue tickets like Jira, Linear etc, and ROVA does the magic of testing the ticket and reporting the feedback.

launches.name: Invite Only
launches.tagline: The event invite that actually gets people to show up
launches.description: Invite Only is an event hosting platform built for WhatsApp-first markets. Create a beautiful event page in under 2 minutes, share one link on WhatsApp, and watch RSVPs roll in. No app download needed. Guests RSVP in 30 seconds via OTP. UPI built in - guests pay, share their transaction ID, done. Real confirmed guest list. Not chat history. We built this because "yes bhai coming" means nothing. Now it means something.

launches.name: AstroGrid - Universe Engine
launches.tagline: Explore the entire universe in your browser, in real 3D
launches.description: AstroGrid turns your browser into a spaceship. Fly from Earth's surface to the edge of the observable universe, all in real 3D. • 119K real stars (HYG catalog) with accurate B-V colors • NASA JPL orbital mechanics for the Solar System, in real time • 14K deep-sky objects, black holes with gravitational lensing, pulsars, supernovae, and gravitational-wave events • Runs entirely client-side. No install, no signup. Built for the curious students, educators, and space nerds.

launches.name: Adoptly
launches.tagline: Turn product releases into feature adoption
launches.description: The most affordable way to create, target, and measure in-app announcements, product update banners, modals, hints, and changelogs for your SaaS app.

launches.name: Docky
launches.tagline: Pin, group, and remove apps easily from your dock
launches.description: Docky is a macOS dock replacement that was build to be silently powerful. It mimics the native dock so you feel right at home, with added features that pack a punch. But if you feel like it, you can customize it using your own backgrounds, active indicators and icons. Docky comes with added features like widgets, app folders, window switching and launchpad built in.

launches.name: Astero - AI Website Builder V1
launches.tagline: The Smart AI Website Builder for Modern Brands
launches.description: Design, launch, and scale your website effortlessly with Astero. A powerful AI-driven platform to build beautiful, high-performing websites without complexity.

launches.name: RoboExtension
launches.tagline: Copy 10×, move 406× faster than Windows Explorer
launches.description: Copying thousands of small files mixed with large ones in Windows Explorer can take days — with no guarantee of finishing. One locked file stalls everything, errors tell you nothing, and you never know what actually made it through. RoboExtension fixes this with the same Ctrl+C, Ctrl+V, right-click — no workflow change. Only up to 10× faster small-file copies, same-volume moves 406× faster, drive-type detection, locked file handling, retry as Administrator, and a post-operation failure report.

launches.name: Side Eye
launches.tagline: Dog-meme habit tracker for people who hate habit apps
launches.description: A habit tracker for people who've tried every other habit app and quit. Built on Jerry Seinfeld's productivity secret: don't break the chain.

launches.name: Universal Undo
launches.tagline: Recover lost text on Android before you retype everything
launches.description: Android still makes it too easy to lose a long reply, draft, or form entry and then forces you to rebuild the original wording from memory. Universal Undo helps bring back the last usable version of typed text before you start over. It is built for the exact moment text disappears on Android and you need a real way back.

launches.name: VestmentPulse
launches.tagline: Master Income Stacking & Infinite Banking
launches.description: VestmentPulse is cashflow tracking software for income stackers and infinite banking strategists. Stop managing your stack in spreadsheets. VestmentPulse tracks your paycheck schedule and current cashflow together, then tells you the exact day your next investment is funded. It also shows your Freedom Date — the day passive income covers your expenses — and how every new asset moves it closer. Built by an income stacker, for income stackers.

launches.name: Noryx
launches.tagline: Modern WordPress theme for digital agencies & startups
launches.description: Noryx is a modern WordPress theme for Digital Agencies, Startups and Creative Businesses. It delivers clean design, fast performance and flexible layouts to help you create professional websites without any coding. Noryx is perfect for portfolios, agency sites and SaaS startups. It makes getting your online presence up and running faster and easier.

launches.name: Postwizer
launches.tagline: The Smartest Way to Build Your Personal Brand on LinkedIn
launches.description: Postwizer is an AI tool that writes LinkedIn posts in your exact writing style. Feed it your best posts, it learns your tone and style, and generates new content that sounds 100% like you — not a robot. Find viral ideas, choose your tone, and even promote your product inside your posts without sounding salesy. Our vision is simple — become the one stop AI platform for personal brand growth across every platform. LinkedIn today. Instagram and YouTube tomorrow. Try it for free at postwizer.com

launches.name: Keynotif
launches.tagline: Sleep Well, Wake Informed.
launches.description: Keynotif is an Android app that helps you start the day with clarity by turning overnight notifications into a clean morning digest. Instead of checking multiple apps one by one, open Keynotif and quickly understand what matters first. It includes privacy-focused AI summaries with anonymization, VIP contact priority, text-to-speech playback, category controls, and no ads. Built for calmer mornings and less notification overload.

launches.name: BezelCast
launches.tagline: Beautiful demos for your next app
launches.description: A free, open-source alternative to getbezel.app for iPhone and iPad demos.

launches.name: The Parallel
launches.tagline: A life running alongside yours.
launches.description: The Parallel app has been launched on IOS.

launches.name: Rankify: ASO Rank Analytics
launches.tagline: Monitor app store rankings and optimize your ASO strategy
launches.description: Track any app's rise or fall across 150+ countries, 28 categories, and 180 days of history with a global heatmap, compare mode and crash & surge alerts. Built for developers, marketers, and ASO professionals.

launches.name: Investorsync
launches.tagline: Describe your startup. Get an investor shortlist.
launches.description: Your intelligent deal sourcing starts here.

launches.name: Drip Send
launches.tagline: Personal emails. Real replies. Natively on Mac.
launches.description: Send personal emails from your Mac and get better replies. Import contacts, preview every message, pace safely, and avoid CRM bloat with Drip Send. Send one email at a time from your own inbox - with full control, no subscriptions, and safer defaults.

launches.name: Lomio
launches.tagline: The maintainable way to make App Store screenshots.
launches.description: Lomio is a Mac app for App Store and Play Store screenshots that actually stay maintainable. • One-canvas editor: design your full set side-by-side, only the visible slice gets exported. Overlapping screenshots become trivial. • Translation built in: swap text and screenshots per language, fill gaps with one click using AI translations. • Smart popouts: call out parts of your screenshot dynamically. They stay in place across languages without duplicating layouts. And of course templates.

launches.name: MockAds
launches.tagline: Create realistic social & ad mockups in seconds
launches.description: MockAds transforms any creative into a realistic mockup across all platforms in under 2 minutes. Stop wasting hours in Photoshop. Get presentation-ready assets instantly. Built for freelancers, agencies, and marketers who present ads to clients. See exactly how your creative will appear on Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, LinkedIn, YouTube, Google Ads, WhatsApp — and more. The problem: clients don't approve strategy. They approve what they can visualize. Free to try. 7 days, no credit card.

launches.name: Quizzy
launches.tagline: Run live quizzes instantly. No signup required.
launches.description: Quizzy lets you run live quizzes instantly—no sign-up required. Just create a quiz, share a code, and everyone joins in seconds. No downloads, no friction. Perfect for classrooms, team events, or quick games with friends. ✨ Real-time leaderboard 📺 TV mode for big screens 🔒 Privacy-first (no accounts, no tracking) ⚡ Starts in seconds Built to remove the friction from tools like Kahoot—so you can focus on having fun. Free to use with a generous plan.

launches.name: ChronoShield API
launches.tagline: A REST API that catches timezone bugs before they ship
launches.description: REST API that validates, resolves, and converts datetimes with all the DST and IANA edge cases handled. Catches the bugs that silently corrupt data — spring-forward gaps, fall-back overlaps, +5:45 offsets, stale tzdata. SDKs on npm and PyPI. Free tier.

launches.name: DevCam
launches.tagline: Never miss a moment. Clip it!
launches.description: Native macOS screen recorder built in SwiftUI and AppKit. No Electron, no account. Free: 15-min recordings, single display. Pro ($4.99/mo or $49.99/yr): up to 1-hour recordings, multi-format export, multi-display capture. Solo founder. Three years in the making.

launches.name: Scanify
launches.tagline: Replace your paper stamp card forever!
launches.description: Replace paper stamp cards with a digital QR loyalty program. Built for cafés, restaurants, and salons across the Middle East. Free to start.

launches.name: CalloutPay
launches.tagline: On-call pay reports from PagerDuty  finance-ready in seconds
launches.description: Calculating on-call pay manually is slow and error-prone. CalloutPay pulls your PagerDuty schedule data, applies your pay rules — flat stipends, per-callout fees, or both — and exports a clean XLSX your finance team can process immediately. Supports UK & US public holidays, GBP, EUR and USD. No spreadsheet wrangling, no chasing data. Free 7-day trial.

launches.name: VersionAlert for Unity
launches.tagline: Track Unity Engine, Hub, and package releases in one place
launches.description: VersionAlert for Unity tracks Unity Engine releases, Unity Hub releases, new Unity packages, and package version updates in one place, with optional email alerts for developers and teams who need to stay current.

launches.name: DahTahDoc
launches.tagline: Alpha: traceable specs to QA handoff
launches.description: DahTahDoc is an alpha-stage product exploring how small software teams can keep specs, version diffs, references, and QA test cases connected. It is not a finished commercial release yet. The current preview is meant for feedback on the Spec-to-QA workflow, document traceability, and handoff gaps between PM, SA, engineering, and QA. (Free alpha preview. No paid plan is currently offered.)

launches.name: A pipeline of real deals
launches.tagline: Turn your ideal client into a pipeline of real deals 💰
launches.description: Dealspipeline turns a simple description of your ideal customer into a ranked pipeline of companies that are actually likely to buy. *You generate 10x sales within 6 months! Get a free workshop with a PRO who has done it.
